name: Pillsbury Corn Dog Twists
recipeIngredient: Pillsbury Cornbread Twists dough, 11.5 oz can (1)
recipeInstructions:
1. Securely insert a wooden stick into each hot dog.
2. Unroll the dough from the can into one long sheet and seal the center perforations.
3. Separate the dough into 8 long strips, with each strip containing 2 twists.
4. Wrap each long strip around a hot dog.
5. Place the wrapped hot dogs on an ungreased cookie sheet, tucking the ends of the dough under the hot dog.
6. Brush the dough with melted margarine and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 16 minutes, or until the Cornbread Twists are light golden brown.
8. Makes 8 Corn Dog Twists.
These are on my "to try" list...just up my kids alley...
